summary: Iteration 232 testing completed successfully. All backend APIs and frontend features verified. Key features tested: 1) Backend GET /api/prompts/today returns 'missed_yesterday' boolean field. 2) Backend GET /api/auth/me returns 'first_name' field with value 'Katie' for test user. 3) STRIPE_API_KEY starts with sk_live_ confirming live mode. 4) Frontend Now Spinning composer shows helper text 'Tell the hive what you love about this record! 🐝' with data-testid='spin-caption-helper'. 5) Now Spinning Post button is disabled when comment is empty. 6) Re-pollinate success page exists at /repollinate/success with data-testid='repollinate-success'. 7) Feed filters show emojis AFTER text ('All 🍯', 'Now Spinning 🐝', etc.). 8) Settings page has First Name * required field with data-testid='settings-first-name'. 9) Desktop navigation shows 'The Vault' label for collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features pass. Katie's account has first_name='Katie'. Backend /api/prompts/today returns missed_yesterday boolean. Backend /api/auth/me returns first_name field. Stripe keys are live mode (sk_live_). Now Spinning composer shows helper text with bee emoji when caption is empty. Post button disabled without comment. /repollinate/success route exists and shows 'Verifying payment...' loading state without session_id. Feed filters have emojis after text. Settings page First Name field is positioned before Username. Navigation shows 'The Vault' for collection link.
